productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Barricade Team White Sports Shoes
description: Offering immediate comfort and absolute performance on the court, the Barricade Team tennis shoe from adidas is an upgrade of the Barricade6.0. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute breathable comfort Meshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfort adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performance Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Inner bootie for wrap-around comfort adiTuff toe protection guard for enhanced durability and protection on the court Midsole Moulded EVA footbed for absolute anatomical comfort and impact protection Torsion system for better stability on various terrain adiPRENE inserts in the heel for absolute cushioning, and adiPRENE+ in the forefoot for enhanced cushioned comfort Outsole Non-marking rubber outsole made with adiWEAR technology for absolute durability Herringbone pattern grooves throughout with a pivot point on big toe mound for absolute grip and traction, and easy 180 degree moveMent of the foot Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
